A [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] '''species''' indigenous to a [[Unidentified planet (seven rings)|seven-ringed world]] that had [[Color/Legends|green]] skin, large [[Ear/Legends|ears]], and a horn on their faces. One member of this race once swore by their [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] rings.<ref name="Star Wars 24" />

{{Species-stub}}
